EmailTemplate.name: Ascension-EmailTemplate-UserAdd-Courion
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if($styleSheet) $styleSheet #end
#foreach($mapElement in $map.entrySet()) #if ($mapElement.getValue()) #if ($mapElement.getKey()) $mapElement.getKey():$mapElement.getValue()
#end #end #end description:
#foreach($mapElement in $description.entrySet()) #if ($mapElement.getValue()) #if ($mapElement.getKey())$mapElement.getKey()=$mapElement.getValue()
#end #end #end

#if($company)Organization=$company
#end Provisioned Details

#foreach($mapElement in $adInfo.entrySet()) #if ($mapElement.getValue()) #if ($mapElement.getKey())$mapElement.getKey():$mapElement.getValue()
#end #end #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying approvers when they need to approve a request made through LCM. Note that in addition to the declared arguments, all workflow variables, Step arguments, and Approval arguments defined in the Workflow are also available.

Argument.name: map
Argument.Description: The ApprovalSet object contained in the work item.

Argument.name: launcher
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that launched the workflow.

Argument.name: identityName
Argument.Description: The name of the Identity that is being changed.

Argument.name: subject
Argument.Description: The subject to be added for rbac role assignment template.

Argument.name: identityDisplayName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that is being changed.

EmailTemplate.Subject: User Add - Courion $!subject
